sentences.text_en: A small village.
sentences.text_lu: E kleng Duerf.

sentences.text_en: I grew up in a very small village located in the north.
sentences.text_lu: Ech sinn an engem ganz klengen Duerf am Norden opgewuess.

sentences.text_en: Life in the village is much slower than life in the big city.
sentences.text_lu: D'Liewen am Duerf ass vill méi lues wéi d'Liewen an der grousser Stad.

sentences.text_en: A high mountain.
sentences.text_lu: Eng héich Bierg.

sentences.text_en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely breath-taking.
sentences.text_lu: D'Vue vum Buedem vum Bierg war absolut atemberaubend.

sentences.text_en: We went hiking in the mountains during our summer holiday.
sentences.text_lu: Mir sinn wärend eiser Summervakanz an de Bierger gewandert.

sentences.text_en: The green forest.
sentences.text_lu: Den grénge Bësch.

sentences.text_en: I like to go for a long walk in the forest to relax.
sentences.text_lu: Ech ginn gären laang am Bësch spadséieren, fir mech ze entspanen.

sentences.text_en: There are many different types of trees in this ancient forest.
sentences.text_lu: Et gëtt vill verschidde Aarte vu Bëmer an dësem ale Bësch.

sentences.text_en: Cold water.
sentences.text_lu: Kal Waasser.

sentences.text_en: Please make sure to drink enough water when it is hot.
sentences.text_lu: Drénkt genuch Waasser wann et waarm ass.

sentences.text_en: The water in the river is very clear and refreshingly cold.
sentences.text_lu: D'Waasser am Floss ass ganz klor a erfrëschend kal.

sentences.text_en: The blue sea.
sentences.text_lu: De bloe Mier.

sentences.text_en: I love to spend my summer holidays by the Mediterranean Sea.
sentences.text_lu: Ech gär meng Summerspiller am Mëttelmier verbréngen.

sentences.text_en: The sound of the sea waves is very calming to listen to.
sentences.text_lu: De Kläng vun de Mierwellen sinn ganz berouegend ze lauschteren.

sentences.text_en: A long river.
sentences.text_lu: E laange Floss.

sentences.text_en: The Moselle river is very important for the local wine industry.
sentences.text_lu: D'Floss ass ganz wichteg fir d'lokal Wäinindustrie.

sentences.text_en: We went for a boat trip along the river yesterday afternoon.
sentences.text_lu: Mir sinn gëschter Nomëtteg op eng Bootsfaart laanscht de Floss gaangen.

sentences.text_en: Fresh air.
sentences.text_lu: Frësch Loft.

sentences.text_en: I need some fresh air after spending all day in the office.
sentences.text_lu: Ech brauch e bëssen frësch Loft nodeem ech de ganzen Dag am Büro war.

sentences.text_en: The air in the mountains is much cleaner than in the city.
sentences.text_lu: D'Loft an den Bierger ass vill méi propper wéi an der Stad.

sentences.text_en: The hot sun.
sentences.text_lu: D'heet Sonn.

sentences.text_en: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west every day.
sentences.text_lu: D'Sonn geet all Dag am Osten op an am Westen ënner.

sentences.text_en: I enjoy sitting in the sun and reading a good book.
sentences.text_lu: Ech genéisst et, an der Sonn ze sëtzen an e gudde Buch ze liesen.

sentences.text_en: The full moon.
sentences.text_lu: De Vollmound.

sentences.text_en: The moon was shining brightly in the dark sky last night.
sentences.text_lu: De Mound huet gëschter an der donkeler Nuecht hell geschéngt.

sentences.text_en: The first man landed on the moon over fifty years ago.
sentences.text_lu: Deen éischte Mënsch ass vir iwwer fofzeg Joer op de Mound gelant.

sentences.text_en: Bright stars.
sentences.text_lu: Helleg Stären.

sentences.text_en: You can see millions of stars in the sky on a clear night.
sentences.text_lu: Dir kënnt Millioune Stäre am Himmel gesinn, bei klorem Himmel.

sentences.text_en: The stars were twinkling like tiny diamonds in the dark sky.
sentences.text_lu: D'Stäre blénken wéi kleng Diamanten am donkelen Himmel.

sentences.text_en: Nice weather.
sentences.text_lu: Schéint Wieder.

sentences.text_en: What is the weather forecast for the upcoming weekend?
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass de Wiederbericht fir de kommenden Weekend?

sentences.text_en: The weather was so bad that we decided to stay at home.
sentences.text_lu: Et war esou schlechtes Wieder, dass mir beschloust hunn, doheem ze bleiwen.

sentences.text_en: Heavy rain.
sentences.text_lu: Staarken Reen

sentences.text_en: The plants in the garden need some rain after the long heat.
sentences.text_lu: D'Planz am Gaart brauchen e bëssen Reen no der laanger Hëtzt.

sentences.text_en: I forgot my umbrella and got soaked in the heavy rain.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn mäi Schirm vergéisst a gouf am schwéieren Reen ganz naass.

sentences.text_en: Strong wind.
sentences.text_lu: Staarke Wand.

sentences.text_en: The wind was blowing very hard during the storm last night.
sentences.text_lu: De Wand blous séier schwéier wärend dem Stuerm gëschter.

sentences.text_en: There is a cold wind coming from the north this morning.
sentences.text_lu: Haut moies kënnt e kale Wand aus dem Norden.

sentences.text_en: My family.
sentences.text_lu: Meng Famill.

sentences.text_en: I am planning to spend the whole weekend with my family.
sentences.text_lu: Ech plannen den ganzen Weekend mat menger Famill ze verbréngen.

sentences.text_en: Family is the most important thing for most people in life.
sentences.text_lu: D'Famill ass déi wichtegst Saach am Liewen fir déi meescht Leit.

sentences.text_en: My parents.
sentences.text_lu: Méi Elteren.

sentences.text_en: My parents live in a small town near the German border.
sentences.text_lu: Meng Elteren wunnen an enger klenger Stad no bei der däitscher Grenz.

sentences.text_en: I call my parents every Sunday evening to catch up.
sentences.text_lu: Sonndes Owend ruff ech all Kéier meng Elteren un, fir ze schwätzen.

sentences.text_en: My mother.
sentences.text_lu: Mamm.

sentences.text_en: My mother is a very kind and caring person.
sentences.text_lu: Mamm ass e ganz kënschlech a këmmerech Mënsch.

sentences.text_en: I bought some beautiful flowers for my mother's birthday.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e puer schéin Blummen fir de Gebuertsdag vu menger Mamm kaaft.

sentences.text_en: My father.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Papp.

sentences.text_en: My father works as a doctor in the local hospital.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Papp schafft als Dokter am lokalen Spital.

sentences.text_en: I like to go fishing with my father during the summer.
sentences.text_lu: Ech gär mat mengem Papp fëschen am Summer.

sentences.text_en: My brother.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Brudder.

sentences.text_en: My older brother is studying engineering at the university.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi groussen Brudder studéiert Ingenieurswiesen op der Uni.

sentences.text_en: I have two brothers who are both younger than me.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn zwou Brudder, déi béid méi jonk sinn wéi ech.

sentences.text_en: My sister.
sentences.text_lu: Meng Schwëster.

sentences.text_en: My sister is a very talented artist and sells her paintings.
sentences.text_lu: Meng Schwëster ass eng ganz talentéiert Kënschtlerin a verkaaft hir Biller.

sentences.text_en: I am going to visit my sister in the city this afternoon.
sentences.text_lu: Ech ginn haut Nomëtten meng Schwëster an der Stad besichen.

sentences.text_en: My best friend.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi beschte Frënd.

sentences.text_en: I have known my best friend since we were in primary school.
sentences.text_lu: Ech kennen mäi beschten Frënd zanter mir an der Primärschoul waren.

sentences.text_en: A true friend is someone who is always there for you.
sentences.text_lu: E richteg Frënd ass een, deen ëmmer fir Iech do ass.

sentences.text_en: A comrade.
sentences.text_lu: E Komerod.

sentences.text_en: We were close comrades during our time in the military.
sentences.text_lu: Mir waren enk Komerod während eiser Zäit am Militär.

sentences.text_en: He is a very reliable comrade who always helps others.
sentences.text_lu: Hien ass e ganz zouverlässege Komerod, deen ëmmer aneren hëlleft.

sentences.text_en: Friendly neighbor.
sentences.text_lu: Frëndlechen Noper.

sentences.text_en: Our neighbors are very nice and always say hello to us.
sentences.text_lu: Eis Noperen sinn ganz sympatesch a seet eis ëmmer Moien.

sentences.text_en: I borrowed some sugar from my neighbor this morning.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn mir Kéis vu mengem Noper ugeléint.

sentences.text_en: Many people.
sentences.text_lu: Vill Leit.

sentences.text_en: There were a lot of people waiting at the bus station today.
sentences.text_lu: Et waren haut vill Leit, déi op de Busstation gewaart hunn.

sentences.text_en: People in this city are generally very friendly and helpful.
sentences.text_lu: D'Leit an dëser Stad sinn allgemeng ganz frëndlech an hëllefsbereet.

sentences.text_en: My name.
sentences.text_lu: Mäin Numm.

sentences.text_en: What is your full name and where do you come from?
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass Ären komplette Vir- a Familljennumm a wou kënnt Dir hier?

sentences.text_en: Please write your name clearly on the top of the paper.
sentences.text_lu: Schreift wgl. Ären Numm ganz kläer op de Spëtz vum Pabeier.

sentences.text_en: My age.
sentences.text_lu: Meng Alter.

sentences.text_en: At what age did you begin to learn a second language?
sentences.text_lu: An op wat Alter hunn ech eng zweete Sprooch geléiert?

sentences.text_en: Age is just a number, what matters is how you feel.
sentences.text_lu: D'Alter ass just eng Zuel, wat zielt ass, wéi Dir Iech fillt.

sentences.text_en: My birthday.
sentences.text_lu: Gebuertsdag.

sentences.text_en: When is your birthday and what are your plans for it?
sentences.text_lu: Wann ass Ären Gebuertsdag a wat sinn Är Pläne fir en?

sentences.text_en: I am having a small party for my birthday this weekend.
sentences.text_lu: Ech ginn eng kleng Party fir mäi Gebuertsdag dëse Weekend.

sentences.text_en: Good luck.
sentences.text_lu: Vill Gléck.

sentences.text_en: I wish you the best of luck with your new job.
sentences.text_lu: Ech wënschen dir vill Gléck mat dengem neie Job.

sentences.text_en: Happiness is finding joy in the small things of life.
sentences.text_lu: Gléck ass, Freude an den klengen Dingen vum Liewen ze fannen.

sentences.text_en: True love.
sentences.text_lu: Wourecht Léift.

sentences.text_en: Love is a powerful feeling that brings people together.
sentences.text_lu: D'Léift ass e mächteg Gefill dat d'Leit zesummenbréngt.

sentences.text_en: He wrote many beautiful poems about his love for nature.
sentences.text_lu: Hie schreift vill schéin Gedichter iwwer seng Léift fir d'Natur.

sentences.text_en: Fear of heights.
sentences.text_lu: Angscht vir Héichten.

sentences.text_en: You should not let fear prevent you from trying new things.
sentences.text_lu: Dir sollt net erlaaben, datt d'Angscht Iech dovun abhält, nei Saachen ze probéieren.

sentences.text_en: The child has a fear of the dark and needs a nightlight.
sentences.text_lu: De Kand huet Angscht virun der Däischtert a brauch e Nachtlicht.

sentences.text_en: Great hope.
sentences.text_lu: Grouss Hoffnung.

sentences.text_en: I have great hope for the future of our planet.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn grouss Hoffnung fir d'Zukunft vun eisem Planéit.

sentences.text_en: Hope is what keeps us going during difficult times.
sentences.text_lu: D'Hoffnung ass wat eis am grousse Ganzen am Liewen weiderféiert.

sentences.text_en: A bad dream.
sentences.text_lu: E schlechten Dram.

sentences.text_en: It has always been my dream to travel around the world.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass ëmmer mäin Dram gewiescht, ronderëm d'Welt ze reesen.

sentences.text_en: I had a very strange dream about a flying elephant last night.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hat gëschter Nuecht e ganz komesche Dram iwwer e fléiende Elefant.

sentences.text_en: A good feeling.
sentences.text_lu: E gutt Gefill.

sentences.text_en: I have a gut feeling that everything will turn out well.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e gudd Gefill, datt alles gutt wäert ausgoen.

sentences.text_en: It is a wonderful feeling to help someone in need.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass e wonnerbart Gefill, eemend an Nout ze hëllefen.

sentences.text_en: Healthy body.
sentences.text_lu: Gesonde Kierper.

sentences.text_en: It is important to keep your body healthy and active.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass wichteg, Äre Kierper gesond an aktiv ze halen.

sentences.text_en: Your body needs rest and nutrition to function properly.
sentences.text_lu: Äre Kierper brauch Rou an Ernährung fir korrekt ze funktionéieren.

sentences.text_en: My head.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Kapp.

sentences.text_en: I have a slight headache and need to rest for a while.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e liichte Kappwéi a muss eng Zäit raschten.

sentences.text_en: Please keep your head up and stay positive during this time.
sentences.text_lu: Halt w.e.g. däi Kapp héich a bleif positiv an dëser Zäit.

sentences.text_en: My hand.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Hand.

sentences.text_en: Please hold my hand when we cross the busy street.
sentences.text_lu: Bitte, halt meng Hand wéi mir déi grouss Strooss iwwerquere wäerten.

sentences.text_en: I burned my hand slightly while I was cooking dinner.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Hand liicht verbrannt wéi ech Iessen gekocht hunn.

sentences.text_en: My foot.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Fouss.

sentences.text_en: I hurt my foot while I was playing football yesterday.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Fouss verletzt wéi ech gëschter Foussball gespillt hunn.

sentences.text_en: We went for a walk on foot through the city center.
sentences.text_lu: Mir sinn zu Fouss duerch d'Stad gelaf.

sentences.text_en: Blue eyes.
sentences.text_lu: Bloe Aen.

sentences.text_en: She has very beautiful eyes that sparkle when she smiles.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet ganz schéin Aen, déi faarwen, wann se lächelt.

sentences.text_en: Please close your eyes and try to relax for a moment.
sentences.text_lu: Maach d'Ae zou a probéier e Moment ze relaxéieren.

sentences.text_en: Small ears.
sentences.text_lu: Kleng Oueren.

sentences.text_en: I can't hear you properly, I have a problem with my ears.
sentences.text_lu: Ech kann Iech net richteg héieren, ech hunn e Problem mat mäi Oueren.

sentences.text_en: Rabbits have very long ears that help them to hear well.
sentences.text_lu: Rabbits hunn ganz laang Oueren, déi hëlleft, gutt ze héieren.

sentences.text_en: My nose.
sentences.text_lu: Meng Nues.

sentences.text_en: I have a runny nose because I caught a cold yesterday.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn eng rinn Nues, well ech gëschter eng Erkältung kritt hunn.

sentences.text_en: The dog has a very good nose and can follow a scent.
sentences.text_lu: De Hond huet eng ganz gutt Nues a kann e Geroch verfollegen.

sentences.text_en: My mouth.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Mond.

sentences.text_en: Please open your mouth so the doctor can take a look.
sentences.text_lu: Ouvert Äre Mond sou dass de Dokter kënnt kucken.

sentences.text_en: Keep your mouth closed while you are chewing your food.
sentences.text_lu: Halt Äre Mond zou wärend Dir Ären Iessen kaust.

sentences.text_en: Long hair.
sentences.text_lu: Laang Hoer.

sentences.text_en: She has long blonde hair that reaches down to her waist.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet laang blond Hoer, dat bis zu der Taille réicht.

sentences.text_en: I need to get my hair cut before the party next week.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss mengen Hoer schneiden loossen virun der Party nächster Woch.

sentences.text_en: Red blood.
sentences.text_lu: Rout Blutt.

sentences.text_en: The doctor took a blood sample to check my health.
sentences.text_lu: De Dokter huet e Bluttproov geholl fir mäi Gesondheet ze kontrolléieren.

sentences.text_en: Blood is vital for carrying oxygen to the whole body.
sentences.text_lu: Blutt ass vital fir Sauerstoff an de ganze Kierper ze transportéieren.

sentences.text_en: Good health.
sentences.text_lu: Gudd Gesondheet.

sentences.text_en: Health is more important than wealth for most people.
sentences.text_lu: Gesondheet ass fir déi meescht Leit méi wichteg wéi Räichtum.

sentences.text_en: I am in very good health thanks to regular exercise.
sentences.text_lu: Ech sinn dank regelméisseger Bewegung a ganz gudder Gesondheet.

sentences.text_en: Serious illness.
sentences.text_lu: Gravide Krankheet.

sentences.text_en: The flu is a very common illness during the winter.
sentences.text_lu: D'Grip ass eng ganz gewëssenlech Krankheet am Wanter.

sentences.text_en: He recovered quickly from his illness and is back at work.
sentences.text_lu: Hien huet sech séier vun senger Krankheet erholl a ass zréck op der Aarbecht.

sentences.text_en: A good doctor.
sentences.text_lu: E gudden Dokter.

sentences.text_en: You should see a doctor if your symptoms get worse.
sentences.text_lu: Sollt Äre Symptomer verschlechteren, sollt Dir e Dokter konsultéieren.

sentences.text_en: The doctor explained the results of the tests to me.
sentences.text_lu: De Dokter huet mir d'Resultater vun de Tester erkläert.

sentences.text_en: The hospital.
sentences.text_lu: De Spidol.

sentences.text_en: The new hospital is equipped with the latest technology.
sentences.text_lu: Dat neit Spidol ass mat der neister Technologie ausgestatt.

sentences.text_en: He had to stay in the hospital for a week after the surgery.
sentences.text_lu: Hien huet no der Operatioun eng Woch am Spidol misse bleiwen.

sentences.text_en: The pharmacy.
sentences.text_lu: D'Apdikt

sentences.text_en: I need to go to the pharmacy to buy some medicine.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss an d'Apdikt goen, fir e puer Medikamenter ze kafen.

sentences.text_en: The pharmacy is located just around the corner from here.
sentences.text_lu: D'Apdikt läit just ëm d'Eck vun hei.

sentences.text_en: Eat lunch.
sentences.text_lu: Esst Mëttegiessen.

sentences.text_en: What would you like to have for dinner this evening?
sentences.text_lu: Wat wëllt Dir amowend fir Iessen?

sentences.text_en: The food at the restaurant was delicious and well prepared.
sentences.text_lu: D'Essen am Restaurant war lecker a gutt virbereet.

sentences.text_en: Drink water.
sentences.text_lu: Drénkt Waasser.

sentences.text_en: I drink a cup of hot tea every morning at breakfast.
sentences.text_lu: All Moien beim Frühstück drénken ech eng Tasse waarmen Téi.

sentences.text_en: What would you like to drink with your meal today?
sentences.text_lu: Wat wëllt Dir bei Ärem Iessen drénken?

sentences.text_en: Fresh bread.
sentences.text_lu: Frësche Brout.

sentences.text_en: I buy fresh bread from the bakery every single day.
sentences.text_lu: Ech kaafen all Dag frëschen Brout bei der Bäckerei.

sentences.text_en: Would you like some bread with your soup tonight?
sentences.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e Stéck Brout zu Ärem Suppe haut Awend?

sentences.text_en: White milk.
sentences.text_lu: Wäiss Mëllech.

sentences.text_en: I take my coffee with a little bit of cold milk.
sentences.text_lu: Ech drénken meng Kaffi mat engem klengen Zousaz kaler Mëllech.

sentences.text_en: Do you want some milk with your cereal this morning?
sentences.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e bëssen Mëllech mat Ärem Cereal dëse Moien?

sentences.text_en: Hot coffee.
sentences.text_lu: Waarm Kaffi.

sentences.text_en: I love the smell of freshly brewed coffee in the morning.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn gär den Duft vu frësch gebréngtem Kaffi am Moien.

sentences.text_en: Would you like some coffee or would you prefer tea?
sentences.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e Kaffi oder wëllt Dir léiwer Téi?

sentences.text_en: Green tea.
sentences.text_lu: Gréngen Téi.

sentences.text_en: I like to drink a cup of green tea in the afternoon.
sentences.text_lu: Ech drénken gären eng Taass gréngen Téi nomëttes.

sentences.text_en: He prefers tea with lemon and honey to milk and sugar.
sentences.text_lu: Hie preferéiert Téi mat Zitrone a Mieles zu Mëllech a Sucre.

sentences.text_en: Cold beer.
sentences.text_lu: Kalt Béier.

sentences.text_en: He ordered a cold beer after a long day of hard work.
sentences.text_lu: Hien huet no engem laangen Dag haarder Aarbecht e kalen Béier bestallt.

sentences.text_en: There are many local types of beer in this country.
sentences.text_lu: An dësem Land ginn et vill lokal Béier.

sentences.text_en: Red wine.
sentences.text_lu: Roude Wäin.

sentences.text_en: The Moselle region is famous for its high quality wines.
sentences.text_lu: D'Moselregioun ass bekannt fir hir héichwäerteg Wäiner.

sentences.text_en: Would you like a glass of red wine with your dinner?
sentences.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e Glas rout Wäin zu Ärem Dinner?

sentences.text_en: Breef meat.
sentences.text_lu: Breef Fleesch.

sentences.text_en: I don't eat meat because I am a strict vegetarian.
sentences.text_lu: Ech iessen kee Fleesch, well ech e strikte Vegetarier sinn.

sentences.text_en: The meat was very tender and cooked to perfection.
sentences.text_lu: D'Fleesch war ganz zart a perfekt gekacht.

sentences.text_en: Fresh fish.
sentences.text_lu: Frëschen Fësch.

sentences.text_en: I am planning to cook fish with vegetables for dinner tonight.
sentences.text_lu: Ech plannen, fir Kuele fir Iessen haut owes Fësch mat Geméis ze kachen.

sentences.text_en: There are many colorful tropical fish in the large aquarium.
sentences.text_lu: Et gëtt vill faarweg, tropesche Fësch an dem groussen Aquarium.

sentences.text_en: Green vegetables.
sentences.text_lu: Gréngen Geméis.

sentences.text_en: It is important to eat a variety of fresh vegetables.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass wichteg, eng Villfalt vu frëschen Geméis ze iessen.

sentences.text_en: I grow my own vegetables in a small garden at home.
sentences.text_lu: Ech züchten meng eegen Geméis an engem klengen Gaart doheem.

sentences.text_en: Fresh fruit.
sentences.text_lu: Frësch Uebst.

sentences.text_en: I like to eat a piece of fruit for my afternoon snack.
sentences.text_lu: Ech iessen gären e Stéck Uebst als Nomëttesnack.

sentences.text_en: There is a wide variety of tropical fruit in the market.
sentences.text_lu: Et gëtt eng grouss Villfalt u tropesche Uebst um Maart.

sentences.text_en: A red apple.
sentences.text_lu: E roude Äppel.

sentences.text_en: An apple a day keeps the doctor away, so they say.
sentences.text_lu: Ee Pomme am Dag hält de Dokter ewech, sou seet een.

sentences.text_en: I bought a bag of red apples from the local farmer.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e Sak roude Äppel vum lokalen Bauer kaaft.

sentences.text_en: Yellow banana.
sentences.text_lu: Banan geel.

sentences.text_en: He ate a banana for breakfast before he went running.
sentences.text_lu: Hien huet eng Banann zum Moiesiessen giess, ier hien gaangen ass lafen.

sentences.text_en: Bananas are a great source of potassium and energy.
sentences.text_lu: Bananen sinn eng super Quell u Kalium a Energie.

sentences.text_en: White sugar.

sentences.text_lu: Héich Beem.

sentences.text_en: There are many ancient trees in this dense and green forest.
sentences.text_lu: An dësem décke a grénge Bësch ginn et vill ale Beem.

sentences.text_en: The children like to climb the old apple tree in our backyard.
sentences.text_lu: D'Kanner gär op den ale Apfelbam an eisem Gaart klammen.

sentences.text_en: Wild animals.
sentences.text_lu: Wëll Déieren

sentences.text_en: There are many different types of animals in the local zoo.
sentences.text_lu: Et gëtt vill verschidden Déierarten am lokalen Zoo.

sentences.text_en: The forest is home to many wild animals that we should protect.
sentences.text_lu: De Bësch ass Heem vu villen Déieren, déi mir solle schützen.

sentences.text_en: My dog.
sentences.text_lu: Mäi Hond.

sentences.text_en: A very large dog was barking at the postman this morning.
sentences.text_lu: E ganz groussen Hond huet de Briefträger haut Moien ugebellen.

sentences.text_en: He takes his dog for a long walk in the park every single day.
sentences.text_lu: All Dag geet hien mat sengem Hond an der Park an eng laang Promenad.

sentences.text_en: Black cat.
sentences.text_lu: Schwaarz Kaz.

sentences.text_en: Our cat likes to catch mice in the garden behind our house.
sentences.text_lu: Eis Kaz huet gär, Mëusen am Gaart hannert eisem Haus ze fänken.

sentences.text_en: The cat was sleeping peacefully on the sofa in the living room.
sentences.text_lu: D'Kaz huet roueg um Sofa am Wunnzëmmer geschlof.

sentences.text_en: A fast horse.
sentences.text_lu: E séiert Päerd.

sentences.text_en: I used to ride horses when I was living in the countryside.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn fréier Päerd gefuer wéi ech op der Land gelieft hunn.

sentences.text_en: The horse was running very fast across the green open field.
sentences.text_lu: De Päerd loup ganz séier iwwer de gréngen, opene Feld.

sentences.text_en: A small bird.
sentences.text_lu: E klengen Vull.

sentences.text_en: I can hear the birds singing in the trees early this morning.
sentences.text_lu: Ech kann d'Vëlleken am Bam fréi moies sangen héieren.

sentences.text_en: The bird built a small nest in the branches of the apple tree.
sentences.text_lu: D'Vull huet e klengt Nest an de Zweige vum Apfelboom gebaut.

sentences.text_en: A small insect.
sentences.text_lu: E kleng Insekt.

sentences.text_en: He is very interested in studying different types of insects.
sentences.text_lu: Hien ass ganz interesséiert am Studium vun de verschiddene Insektenaarten.

sentences.text_en: There are many insects in the garden during the summer months.
sentences.text_lu: Et gëtt vill Insekten am Gaart während den Summer Méint.

sentences.text_en: It is right.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass Recht.

sentences.text_en: Every person has the right to a good and safe education.
sentences.text_lu: All Persoun huet Recht op eng gutt an sécher Educatioun.

sentences.text_en: You have the right to remain silent, but you should tell the truth.
sentences.text_lu: Dir hutt de Recht, schwiegen ze bleiwen, awer Dir sollt d'Wahrheet soen.

sentences.text_en: The law.
sentences.text_lu: D'Gesetz.

sentences.text_en: It is the law that everyone must follow the rules of the road.
sentences.text_lu: Et ass Gesetz, datt jidderee d'Regelen vum Stroossverkéier muss befollegen.

sentences.text_en: The new legislation was passed by the parliament last night.
sentences.text_lu: D'nei Gesetzgebung gouf leschté Nacht vum Parlament ugeholl.

sentences.text_en: A lot of money.
sentences.text_lu: Vill Geld.

sentences.text_en: Money cannot buy you happiness, but it can provide security.
sentences.text_lu: Geld kann Iech net Gléck kafen, et kann Iech awer Sécherheet ginn.

sentences.text_en: I have been saving some money to buy a new computer next year.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e bëssen Geld gespuert fir nächst Joer e neien Computer ze kafen.

sentences.text_en: Low price.
sentences.text_lu: Faarwen Präis.

sentences.text_en: The price of the tickets has increased significantly this year.
sentences.text_lu: De Präis vun den Entréen ass dëst Joer wesentlech gestiigen.

sentences.text_en: What is the final price of this item after the discount?
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass de finale Präis vun dësem Artikel no der Reduktioun?

sentences.text_en: A willow basket.
sentences.text_lu: E Kuerf aus Weiden.

sentences.text_en: Please put the fresh apples into the basket on the table.
sentences.text_lu: Bitte setzt d'frësch Äppelen an de Kuerf op dem Dësch.

sentences.text_en: She carried a large basket filled with colorful farm flowers.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet e groussen Kuerf mat faarwege Blummen aus dem Bauerenhaff gedroen.

sentences.text_en: A blue pocket.
sentences.text_lu: Eng blo Täsch.

sentences.text_en: I have left my keys in the pocket of my blue winter jacket.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Schlësselen an der Täsch vu menger bloer Wanterjackett gelooss.

sentences.text_en: She is carrying a small bag with all her personal belongings.
sentences.text_lu: Si dréit eng kleng Täsch mat all hire perséinleche Saachen.

sentences.text_en: Clean clothes.
sentences.text_lu: Propper Kleeder.

sentences.text_en: I need to buy some new clothes for the upcoming wedding.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss e puer nei Kleeder fir déi kommend Hochzäit kaafen.

sentences.text_en: Please put your dirty clothes into the basket in the bathroom.
sentences.text_lu: Setz w.e.g. deng schmutzeg Kleed an de Kuerf am Buedzëmmer.

sentences.text_en: One pair of trousers.
sentences.text_lu: Eng Box.

sentences.text_en: I bought a new pair of blue trousers from the local store.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e neit Paar blo Box am lokalen Buttek kaaft.

sentences.text_en: He prefers wearing trousers to shorts, even during the summer.
sentences.text_lu: Hien zitt Box léiwer wéi Shorts un, och am Summer.

sentences.text_en: New dress.
sentences.text_lu: Neit Kleed.

sentences.text_en: She was wearing a very beautiful red dress for the party.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet e ganz schéinten, rouden Kleed fir d'Party gedroen.

sentences.text_en: I need to find a suitable dress for the formal dinner tonight.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss e passenden Kleed fir den formellen Dinner haut Awend fannen.

sentences.text_en: New shoes.
sentences.text_lu: Nei Schong.

sentences.text_en: I need a pair of comfortable shoes for our walking holiday.
sentences.text_lu: Ech brauch e Paar bequeme Schong fir eise Wandersäi.

sentences.text_en: Please take off your shoes before you enter the living room.
sentences.text_lu: W.e.g. zitt Är Schong aus, ier Dir an d'Wunnzëmmer erakënnt.

sentences.text_en: Warm jacket.
sentences.text_lu: Waarm Jackett.

sentences.text_en: I wore a thick jacket because it was very cold outside tonight.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn eng déck Jackett gedroen, well et ganz kal war baussen haut an der Nuecht.

sentences.text_en: Where did you hang my blue jacket after the meeting today?
sentences.text_lu: Wou héisd Dir meng blo Jackett no der Reunioun haut?

sentences.text_en: One clock.
sentences.text_lu: Eng Auer.

sentences.text_en: What time is it on your watch? My clock has stopped working.
sentences.text_lu: Wéi vill Zäit huet Dir op Är Auer? Mäin Auer ass kaputt.

sentences.text_en: The church clock strikes every hour and can be heard everywhere.
sentences.text_lu: D'Kierchglock schléit all Auer a kann iwwerall héiert ginn.

sentences.text_en: A pair of glasses.
sentences.text_lu: Eng Brëll.

sentences.text_en: I need to wear my glasses when I am reading or working.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss meng Brëll droen wann ech liesen oder schaffen.

sentences.text_en: I have lost my glasses and I cannot see anything clearly.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Brëller verluer an ech kann näischt kloer gesinn.

sentences.text_en: Small phone.
sentences.text_lu: Klenge Telefon.

sentences.text_en: Can I borrow your phone for a moment to make a quick call?
sentences.text_lu: Kann ech däin Telefon e Moment ausléinen, fir e séieren Uruff ze maachen?

sentences.text_en: I have left my mobile phone at home on the kitchen table.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn mäin Telefon doheem um Kichen-Dësch geloss.

sentences.text_en: New computer.
sentences.text_lu: Neien Computer.

sentences.text_en: I use my computer for work and also for playing many games.
sentences.text_lu: Ech benotzen meng Computer fir Aarbecht an och fir vill Spiller ze spillen.

sentences.text_en: The computer crashed while I was writing an important report.
sentences.text_lu: Den Computer ass beim Schreiwen vun engem wichtegen Rapport ofgebrach.

sentences.text_en: The internet.
sentences.text_lu: Den Internet.

sentences.text_en: I use the internet to find information and stay in contact.
sentences.text_lu: Ech benotzen den Internet fir Informatiounen ze fannen an a Kontakt ze bleiwen.

sentences.text_en: The internet has changed the way we communicate and work.
sentences.text_lu: Den Internet huet d'Manéier wéi mir kommunizéieren an schaffen, verännert.

sentences.text_en: A nice picture.
sentences.text_lu: E schéint Bild.

sentences.text_en: I found a very old picture of my grandparents in a box.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e ganz alen Bild vu menge Grousselteren an enger Këscht fonnt.

sentences.text_en: She painted a beautiful picture of the mountains during sunset.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet e schéint Bild vun de Bierger bei Sonnenënnergang gemoolt.

sentences.text_en: Good music.
sentences.text_lu: Gud Musek.

sentences.text_en: What kind of music do you like to listen to in your free time?
sentences.text_lu: Wéi eng Zort Musek lauschters du gär an Är Fräizäit?

sentences.text_en: The sound of the music was coming from the house next door.
sentences.text_lu: De Kläng vun der Musek koumen aus dem Haus nieftan.

sentences.text_en: Fun game.
sentences.text_lu: Lustigt Spill.

sentences.text_en: We played a fun board game with the children last night.
sentences.text_lu: Mir hunn e Spaass-Spill mat de Kanner gespillt.

sentences.text_en: The final score of the football game was a tie of two-two.
sentences.text_lu: De finale Score vum Footballspill war e 2-2 Unentschieden.

sentences.text_en: Good sport.
sentences.text_lu: Gudden Sport.

sentences.text_en: I like to play sport and be active during the weekends.
sentences.text_lu: Ech gär Sport treiben an aktiv sinn am Weekend.

sentences.text_en: What is your favorite sport to watch or play at the weekend?
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass Äre Liiblingssport, deen am Weekend gekuckt oder gespillt gëtt?

sentences.text_en: A round ball.
sentences.text_lu: Eng ronn Ball.

sentences.text_en: The dog is playing with a small red ball in the garden.
sentences.text_lu: De Hond spillt am Gaart mat engem klengen, rouden Ball.

sentences.text_en: We need a new ball for our football match tomorrow afternoon.
sentences.text_lu: Mir brauchen e neie Ball fir eise Foussballmatch am Mëtteg.

sentences.text_en: Holiday Trip.
sentences.text_lu: Vakanz

sentences.text_en: Where are you going for your summer holiday this year?
sentences.text_lu: Wou gees du dëst Joer op däi Summervakanz?

sentences.text_en: I am looking forward to my holiday and relaxing by the sea.
sentences.text_lu: Ech freie mech op mäi Vakanz a relaxen am Mier.

sentences.text_en: A long journey.
sentences.text_lu: Eng laang Rees.

sentences.text_en: The journey to the city takes about two hours by fast train.
sentences.text_lu: D'Rees an d'Stad dauert ongeféier zwou Stonnen mat dem Schnellzuch.

sentences.text_en: Travel broadens the mind and provides many new experiences.
sentences.text_lu: Reesen erweidert de Geescht a bitt vill nei Erfahrungen.

sentences.text_en: A city map.
sentences.text_lu: Eng Stadkaart.

sentences.text_en: Can you please show me the location of the hotel on the map?
sentences.text_lu: Kënnt Dir mir w.e.g. d'Lokalitéit vum Hotel op der Kaart weisen?

sentences.text_en: I bought a map of the city from the tourist information office.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn eng Kaart vun der Stad am Tourist-Informatiounsbüro kaaft.

sentences.text_en: A train ticket.
sentences.text_lu: E Ticket.

sentences.text_en: I need to buy a ticket for the train journey to Berlin.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss e Ticket fir d'Zuchrees no Berlin kafen.

sentences.text_en: How much does a return ticket to the city center cost today?
sentences.text_lu: Wéi vill kascht e Retourbiljet an de Stadzentrum haut?

sentences.text_en: Big hotel.
sentences.text_lu: Grouss Hotel.

sentences.text_en: We stayed in a very nice hotel near the center of the city.
sentences.text_lu: Mir hunn an engem ganz schéonen Hotel bei der Stad gebleit.

sentences.text_en: Is the breakfast included in the price of the hotel room?
sentences.text_lu: Ass de Frühstück am Präis vum Hotelzëmmer abegraff?

sentences.text_en: A soft seat.
sentences.text_lu: E mëllen Sëtz.

sentences.text_en: Please take a seat and wait for a moment in the hallway.
sentences.text_lu: Sëtz Iech w.e.g. a waart e Moment am Flur.

sentences.text_en: The window seat is my favorite place to sit on the train.
sentences.text_lu: De Sëtz am Fënster ass mäi Liiblingsplaz am Zuch.

sentences.text_en: Bright light.
sentences.text_lu: Helle Luucht.

sentences.text_en: Please turn on the light because it is getting dark in here.
sentences.text_lu: Maach wgl. d'Luucht un, well et gëtt dëstéis duerch d'Däischter.

sentences.text_en: The light was coming from the candle on the dining table.
sentences.text_lu: D'Luucht koum vun der Kerz um Iessdësch.

sentences.text_en: Hot fire.
sentences.text_lu: Feier Saach.

sentences.text_en: We sat by the fire and talked until the early morning hours.
sentences.text_lu: Mir hu bei d'Feier gesat a geschwat bis an d'fréi Moiesstonnen.

sentences.text_en: The fire department arrived quickly to put out the small fire.
sentences.text_lu: D'Feierwehr ass séier ukomm, fir de klenge Feier ze läschen.

sentences.text_en: The planet Earth.
sentences.text_lu: De Planéit Äerd.

sentences.text_en: The Earth is the only planet that we know has life on it.
sentences.text_lu: D'Äerd ass den eenzegen Planéit, op deem et Liewen gëtt, wéi mir wëssen.

sentences.text_en: Protecting the environment is vital for the future of Earth.
sentences.text_lu: Den Schutz vun der Ëmwelt ass vital fir d'Zukunft vun der Äerd.

sentences.text_en: A hard stone.
sentences.text_lu: Ee haarde Steen.

sentences.text_en: The old wall was built of heavy stones from the river.
sentences.text_lu: Déi al Mauer gouf aus schwéiere Steng vum Floss gebaut.

sentences.text_en: He threw a small stone into the lake and watched the ripples.
sentences.text_lu: Hie geworfen e klenge Stee an de Séi a kucke wéi d'Wellen sech verbreeden.

sentences.text_en: Fine sand.
sentences.text_lu: Feine Sand.

sentences.text_en: The children were playing in the sand on the beach all day.
sentences.text_lu: D'Kanner hunn de ganzen Dag am Sand um Strand gespillt.

sentences.text_en: The sand was very hot under the sun during the afternoon.
sentences.text_lu: De Sand war de Mëttegen ganz waarm an der Sonn.

sentences.text_en: Hard metal.
sentences.text_lu: Haarden Metall.

sentences.text_en: The gate is made of solid metal and is very heavy to move.
sentences.text_lu: D'Porte ass aus massivem Metall a si ass ganz schwéier ze beweegen.

sentences.text_en: Gold and silver are two of the most valuable types of metal.
sentences.text_lu: Gold a Sëlwer sinn zwee vun de wäertvollste Metalltypen.

sentences.text_en: Brown wood.
sentences.text_lu: Brong Holz.

sentences.text_en: The table is made of solid oak wood and will last for years.
sentences.text_lu: D'Tisch ass aus massivem Eichenholz gefertigt a wäert Joerzéngte laang halen.

sentences.text_en: We used some wood to build a fire and stay warm tonight.
sentences.text_lu: Mir hunn e bëssen Holz benotzt fir e Feier ze bauen an waarm ze bleiwen dës Nuecht.

sentences.text_en: A glass of water.
sentences.text_lu: E Glas Waasser.

sentences.text_en: Please be careful with the glass door, it is very fragile.
sentences.text_lu: Bitte passt op d'Glasdier op, et ass ganz brisant.

sentences.text_en: I broke a window glass while I was playing ball outside.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn e Fënsterglas gebrochen wéi ech dobaussen Ball gespillt hunn.

sentences.text_en: A plastic bottle.
sentences.text_lu: Eng Plastikfläsch.

sentences.text_en: We should all try to use less plastic to help the planet.
sentences.text_lu: Mir sollten all probéieren, wéineger Plastik ze benotzen, fir de Planéit ze hëllefen.

sentences.text_en: The toy is made of durable plastic and is safe for kids.
sentences.text_lu: De Spillsaach ass aus robustem Plastik gefertigt a siicht fir Kanner sécher.

sentences.text_en: A round shape.
sentences.text_lu: Eng ron Form.

sentences.text_en: What is the shape of the building on the corner over there?
sentences.text_lu: Wéi ass d'Form vum Gebai an der Eck do?

sentences.text_en: I am currently out of shape and need to start exercising more.
sentences.text_lu: Ech sinn momentan a schlechter Form a muss méi Sport treiben.

sentences.text_en: A big circle.
sentences.text_lu: E grousse Krees.

sentences.text_en: The children were sitting in a large circle on the floor.
sentences.text_lu: D'Kanner sassen an engem groussen Krees um Buedem.

sentences.text_en: Please draw a circle around the correct answer on the paper.
sentences.text_lu: Zeechent w.e.g. e Krees ëm déi richteg Äntwert op dem Pabeier.

sentences.text_en: A square box.
sentences.text_lu: Eng Quadrat Këscht.

sentences.text_en: The room is a perfect square and has four large windows.
sentences.text_lu: D'Zëmmer ass e perfekte Quadrat a huet véier grouss Fënsteren.

sentences.text_en: Please check the square box if you agree with the statement.
sentences.text_lu: Kruet wgl. de Karesch Këscht, wann Dir mat der Ausso averstannt.

sentences.text_en: A straight line.
sentences.text_lu: Eng gerad Linn.

sentences.text_en: Wait here behind the yellow line for the next train to come.
sentences.text_lu: Waart hei hannert der gieler Linn op den nächsten Zuch.

sentences.text_en: I have to write a few lines for my new project tonight.
sentences.text_lu: Ech muss fir mäi neien Projet haut Awen e puer Zeilen schreiwen.

sentences.text_en: A small point.
sentences.text_lu: E klengen Punkt.

sentences.text_en: Wait for a moment, I have an important point to make now.
sentences.text_lu: Waart e Moment, ech hunn e wichtegen Punkt, deen ech elo muss maachen.

sentences.text_en: Put a full stop at the end of every complete sentence.
sentences.text_lu: Setzt e Punkt um Enn vun all komplettem Satz.

sentences.text_en: Big size.
sentences.text_lu: Grouss Gréisst.

sentences.text_en: What is the size of the room and how many windows does it have?
sentences.text_lu: Wéi Gréisst ass d'Zëmmer a wéi vill Fënsteren huet et?

sentences.text_en: I need a medium size jacket that is not too big or too small.
sentences.text_lu: Ech brauch eng Jackett vun mëttlerer Gréisst, déi net ze grouss oder ze kleng ass.

sentences.text_en: Heavy weight.
sentences.text_lu: Schwéier Gewiicht

sentences.text_en: What is the weight of the package that you want to send?
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass de Gewiicht vum Package, deen Dir schécken wëllt?

sentences.text_en: Losing weight is a difficult task that requires a lot of patience.
sentences.text_lu: Gewiicht ze verléieren ass eng schwéier Aufgab, déi vill Gedold verlaangt.

sentences.text_en: The height.
sentences.text_lu: D'Héicht.

sentences.text_en: What is the total height of the Eiffel Tower in Paris?
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass d'total Héicht vum Eiffeltuerm zu Paräis?

sentences.text_en: He has a fear of heights and avoids going up tall buildings.
sentences.text_lu: Hien huet Angscht vir Héicht a vermeit et, an héich Gebaier ze goen.

sentences.text_en: Long length.
sentences.text_lu: Laang Längt.

sentences.text_en: The length of the river is over two hundred kilometers.
sentences.text_lu: D'Längt vum Floss ass méi wéi zwee Honnert Kilometer.

sentences.text_en: What is the total length of the movie? I hope it is short.
sentences.text_lu: Wat ass d'total Längt vum Film? Ech hoffen et ass kuerz.

sentences.text_en: Wide width.
sentences.text_lu: Breet.

sentences.text_en: The width of the road is not sufficient for two large trucks.
sentences.text_lu: D'Breet vun der Strooss ass net suffizient fir zwee grouss Camionen.

sentences.text_en: The painting has a width of one meter and is very beautiful.
sentences.text_lu: De Tableau huet eng Breet vun engem Meter a ass ganz schéin.

sentences.text_en: The depth.
sentences.text_lu: Déi Déift.

sentences.text_en: The depth of the lake is over fifty meters in some parts.
sentences.text_lu: D'Déift vum Séi ass an e puer Deeler iwwer fënnefzéng Meter.

sentences.text_en: We dived to a depth of ten meters to see the colorful fish.
sentences.text_lu: Mir sinn op eng Déift vu zéng Meter ofgestouss fir déi faarweg Fësch ze gesinn.

sentences.text_en: Good smell.
sentences.text_lu: Gutt Geroch.

sentences.text_en: The smell of freshly baked bread was coming from the kitchen.
sentences.text_lu: De Geroch vu frësch gebakene Brout koum aus der Kichen.

sentences.text_en: I really like the smell of coffee early in the morning.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn wierklech gär de Geroch vum Kaffi ganz fréi moies.

sentences.text_en: Good taste.
sentences.text_lu: Gutt Goût.

sentences.text_en: I like the sweet taste of the fruit that I bought today.
sentences.text_lu: Ech gär den séissen Goût vum Uebst, dat ech haut kaaft hunn.

sentences.text_en: That was a very tasty meal, thank you for the invitation.
sentences.text_lu: Dat war e ganz Goût Iessen, merci fir d'Invitatioun.

sentences.text_en: Loud noise.
sentences.text_lu: Héich Geräisch.

sentences.text_en: I heard a strange noise coming from the garden last night.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn gëschter Owend e komesche Geräisch aus dem Gaart héieren.

sentences.text_en: The noise of the traffic made it difficult for me to sleep.
sentences.text_lu: De Geräisch vum Verkéier huet et mir schwéier gemaach ze schlofen.

sentences.text_en: Soft voice.
sentences.text_lu: Stëmm vu mëller Natur.

sentences.text_en: She has a very soft and pleasant voice that I like a lot.
sentences.text_lu: Si huet eng ganz mëll a prett Stëmm, déi ech ganz gär hunn.

sentences.text_en: I recognized his voice immediately when he began speaking.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn seng Stëmm direkt erkannt, wéi hien ugefaang huet ze schwätzen.

sentences.text_en: Deep sleep.
sentences.text_lu: Déif Schlof.

sentences.text_en: I had a very good night's sleep and feel refreshed today.
sentences.text_lu: Ech hunn ganz gutt geschlof an ech feelen meech frësch haut.

sentences.text_en: The baby is in a deep sleep, so please keep the room quiet.
sentences.text_lu: De Béi ass an engem déife Schlof, also bleift wgl. roueg am Raum.

sentences.text_en: Deep thought.
sentences.text_lu: Déipper Gedanken.

sentences.text_en: What are your thoughts on the current situation in the city?
sentences.text_lu: Wat Gedanken iwwer d'aktuell Situatioun an der Stad?

sentences.text_en: I have many thoughts about our future plans and projects.
